```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement on-call rotation and incident management"
---
# On-Call Management
## Task
Set up on-call rotation and incident response.
## Requirements
1. Define on-call schedule and rotation. 2. Create escalation policies.
3. Define incident severity levels. 4. Create runbooks for common incidents.
5. Conduct blameless post-mortems.
## Constraints
- 30-minute response time. Escalate after 15 min no-response. Blameless culture.
## Success Criteria
- On-call covered 24/7. Incidents responded to within SLA. Post-mortems improve reliability.
```
